channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Uttarakhand HC criticises state for detaining activist joining CJP protest
item.description: The Uttarakhand High Court has condemned the state government for detaining political activist Prabhat Dhyani after he expressed intent to join the Cockroach Janta Party's protest in Delhi. The court'...

item.title: SABC1 Reshuffles Weeknight Schedule with Uzalo and Generations: The Legacy
item.description: SABC1 has announced a significant change to its weekday primetime schedule, moving the long-running soap opera 'Generations: The Legacy' to 8.30pm starting 27 July 2026. This marks the first timeslot ...

item.title: Tanzania faces financial transparency challenges after Katoro cash display
item.description: A public display of 1.004 billion Tanzanian shillings in Katoro, Geita, has sparked national debate about currency management and financial transparency. While the event itself poses no direct economi...

item.title: Zelensky Replaces Army Chief Amid Protests and Political Tensions
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky replaced his long-serving army chief, Oleksandr Syrsky, with joint forces commander Mykhailo Drapaty after weeks of protests. The move came following the removal...

item.title: Queer Art and Church Spaces: A Global Historical Perspective
item.description: The article explores the historical intersection between queer art and church spaces, highlighting both tensions and collaborations. It begins with the closure of Divine Playhouse, a queer arts venue ...

item.title: Bran Muffin Recipe: Versatile Option with or without Raisins
item.description: This article presents a wholesome bran muffin recipe that can be prepared with or without raisins, catering to different preferences. The recipe highlights the debate around raisins in bran muffins, w...

item.title: Tanya Aguila's initiatives to promote women's health and empowerment
item.description: Tanya Aguila, a prominent figure in Philippine society, is championing a visionary approach to enhance the well-being and strength of women. Her initiatives focus on creating a healthier generation th...

item.title: Canadian Provinces Move Toward Direct Alcohol Sales to Reduce Trade Barriers
item.description: Provinces across Canada are implementing new rules to allow direct-to-consumer alcohol sales, aiming to dismantle interprovincial trade barriers that have long restricted the free movement of alcohol ...

item.title: Shandre Campbell Joins KV Kortrijk with High Hopes for Belgian Promotion
item.description: South African football prospect Shandre Campbell has signed with newly promoted Belgian club KV Kortrijk, marking a significant step in his career. The 21-year-old winger, who previously played for Cl...

item.title: AI Deepfake Crisis: Singer Kate Ceberano Confronts Unwanted Digital Aftermath
item.description: Australian singer Kate Ceberano has expressed profound distress after encountering a deepfake AI-generated image depicting her emotionally distraught over the death of late actor Sam Neill. The fabric...

item.title: Iran strikes US assets in Gulf amid Houthi threats to broaden regional conflict
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have escalated sharply as Iran has targeted US military installations in the Gulf region, including radar and air defence systems in Kuwait and Bahrain. This comes after th...

item.title: Young Africans Appoints Four Assistant Coaches Under New Manager Manqoba
item.description: Young Africans (Yanga), one of Tanzania's premier football clubs, has officially appointed four assistant coaches to support their new head coach Manqoba Mngqithi. The announcement was made on July 21...

item.title: Vincent's Truthful Moments in 'The Alibi' Series
item.description: The article highlights 10 instances from the Philippine TV series 'The Alibi' where Vincent Cabrera's dialogue revealed crucial truths that advanced the plot. Published on July 22, 2026, the piece exp...

item.title: Supreme Court directs fresh trial in Rajasthan blast case due to lack of legal representation
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has overturned the conviction and death sentence of Abdul Hameed, accused in the 1996 Samleti bus blast case that killed 14 people. The court emphasized that legal fairness,...

item.title: Hegseth defends additional U.S. military funding as Iran war costs rise to US$37.5 billion
item.description: U.S. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth told the Senate Appropriations Committee that the war with Iran has now cost approximately US$37.5 billion and argued that Congress should approve additional emerge...

item.title: US Condemns China's Actions in West Philippine Sea Clash During Rubio's Manila Visit
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrived in Manila to address tensions with China over maritime disputes in the West Philippine Sea. The US condemned China's 'dangerous and aggressive actions' follow...

item.title: Rick and Morty film in development as creator confirms script progress
item.description: Dan Harmon, co-creator of Rick and Morty, has confirmed that the animated series' first feature film is in development. The project, which had been speculated about for years, is currently in the scri...

item.title: Retired Police DIG Accused Of Ordering Torture Of Ex-Boyfriend Despite Court Bail
item.description: A retired Deputy Inspector General of Police (DIG), Hilary Opara, has been accused of allegedly instructing prison authorities to chain and torture David Nwokorie, the former boyfriend of his daughter...

item.title: Supreme Court's strategic legal moves overshadow Trump's political setbacks
item.description: The article discusses how the U.S. Supreme Court is advancing a long-term constitutional transformation plan, despite recent high-profile losses for President Donald Trump. Legal scholar Aziz Huq argu...

item.title: Abdul El-Sayed's Senate Campaign Focuses on Michigan's Public Health Crisis
item.description: Abdul El-Sayed, a progressive Democrat and MD-PhD candidate for Michigan's Senate seat, discusses the state's dual public health crises: wildfire smoke pollution and cyclosporiasis outbreaks. As a for...
